name: date_dim_quarter_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts quarter-of-year directly from month-of-year.
comment: Added as a clean calendar lookup task where month should be sufficient to recover quarter exactly.

name: date_dim_weekend_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts whether a date falls on a weekend from day-of-week.
comment: Added as a deterministic calendar classifier where the weekend label should be recoverable directly from d_dow.
target_expression: CAST(CASE WHEN d_weekend = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS INTEGER)
